item.title: CAR-T Therapy for Autoimmune Diseases
item.description:
• Summary: CAR-T therapy is making significant strides in treating autoimmune diseases, with clinical advances demonstrating durable remission by selectively depleting pathogenic B cells or other immune cells involved in autoimmunity.
  • MoAs: CAR-T therapy involves engineering patient T cells to express chimeric antigen receptors targeting specific antigens (e.g., CD19 on B cells), leading to targeted cell lysis and modulation of autoimmune responses.
  • Sources: STAT News
